evidence.task: R68 deep audit — 11 bugs found, 9 fixed in code

key_fixes: bug#40 HIGH state_checksum binds tick into hash (was state-only → replay-tick-spoofing)
bug#41 HIGH replay_verifier matches by TICK not index (scrambled order no longer false-divergence)
bug#42 HIGH SamplingPolicy throws on unknown kind (was silent false)
bug#43 CRIT forensic_dump path-traversal guard (.. + absolute + null-byte)
bug#44 HIGH forensic safe-serializer handles circular refs (was crash)
bug#45 MED safe-serializer marker for BigInt (was crash)
bug#46 MED safe-serializer markers for NaN / Infinity / -Infinity / Date / Symbol / function (was silent null or crash)
bug#47 LOW timestamp must be ISO-8601 (XSS hardening)
bug#48 LOW duplicate tick in verifier inputs throws explicitly
bug#50 CRIT verifier rejects when checksum method field differs between sequences
documented_only: bug#49 interval mismatch in generateCheckpoints (caller config issue, document)
bug#48 LOW dedup → resolved as throw (above)
